title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Verify full onboarding flow is displayed for first-time pairing of supported devices (Osprey/Tern/Emu), including navigation, content verification, fit test, and re-display on second device pairing.
steps: Pair a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) for the first time.
Verify that onboarding screens are displayed.
Navigate through onboarding screens by swiping or tapping Next/Skip.
Verify content and animations match Figma designs.
Run the fit test and verify both pass and fail states.
Complete onboarding via Done or User Guide.
Verify that onboarding screens appear again for the second device.
expected: Onboarding screens are displayed when connecting a supported device for the first time. The full flow works correctly: navigation, content/animations match Figma, fit test handles pass/fail states, onboarding completes successfully, and onboarding reappears when pairing a second supported device.
